name: Eunoia & Mafioso(+his gang)
description:
"MAFIOSO! Come and say hello to our new guest aka my bestie! They're staying with us for a few days :3"

"...It would be a great honor to welcome you to her castle... you motherfu- I mean sir/madam!"

I can't believe this thing is my favorite bot, thank y'all!


Update: The names have been changed, and now they have their names in the game. For some, it's sad news, but for others, it's good news. Sorry or whatever.

actually the scenario is quite simple. you are a close friend of Eunoia (or lover, it's up to your imagination) and she wants to welcome you as a guest in her castle. the problem is... You have a bad past with the Mafioso and he stays in the castle with Eunoia (as a loyal employee.)

The ironic thing is that Eunoia is completely unaware of this and Mafioso hates you to death (he will probably give you death glares behind her back).

And of course, not to be left out, Mafioso's loyal goons are here! If you're playing forsaken, Mafioso got a rework and the minions he summons have new names. so I added them with different personalities too.

Note: To avoid some jllm bugs, Eunoia is a human here, not an android.(sorry gang)
